title: Key Account Manager (Retail or FMCG Industry)
description:
Our client is distributor for Toys & Games / Lifestyle products. Due to their current expansion plan, they are looking for a Key Account Manager to join their team, in hopes of developing the current high performing team. They are located in the North.


Job Responsibilities:

  • Analyze market trends and industry data to identify new business opportunities.
  • Explore emerging markets and develop partnerships to expand brand presence.
  • Generate leads through networking, outreach, and industry events.
  • Develop strong product knowledge across all Play Nation brands and consumer segments.
  • Create sales materials to educate partners on product lines.
  • Curate channel-specific product assortments and craft sell-in strategies.
  • Build and maintain strong relationships with key account managers across retail and distribution channels.
  • Collaborate closely with customers, suppliers, distributors, and other external partners to support business growth.
  • Drive sales performance and meet/exceed sales targets.
  • Use internal and external data to forecast sales trends, stock needs, and product demand.
  • Provide actionable insights based on analytics.
  • Work closely with internal teams such as Logistics and Design to support channel needs.
  • Articulate key customer insights to influence internal decisions and support business planning.

Job Requirements:

  • Bachelor’s degree in Business or a related field.
  • 2–3 years of experience in business development, sales, FMCG, or similar industry.
  • Excellent communication, presentation, and stakeholder management skills.
  • Strong time management, planning, and organizational abilities.
  • Proficiency in Excel, PowerPoint, and general PC skills.
  • Experience leading or coordinating cross-functional projects.
  • Passion for the Games & Toys industry is an added advantage.

Interested candidates who wish to apply for the advertised position, please click APPLY NOW or email an updated copy of your resume/cv.

We regret that only shortlisted candidate will be notified.


Recruitpedia Pte. Ltd.

It will be our greatest honour to be able to guide you along the ever-changing job market and assist you step-by-step with any challenges you face along the way.

RecruitPedia believes that all our clients and candidates deserve excellent service and strives to be the best and trusted service provider.
